modules.name: ikclient
documentation: Allows ikclient to be imported as a module.

modules.name: ikclient.cli.rich
documentation: Override, wrap or embed rich components to display info about endpoint and runs.

functions.name: ikclient.cli.rich.logging_config
documentation:
Configure logging to use rich as handler.

Args:
    debug: True if we must display debug, False otherwise

functions.name: ikclient.cli.rich.show_results
documentation:
Show run Results outputs, e.g. display image and pretty print data as json.

Args:
    results: A Results object to display outputs

functions.name: ikclient.cli.rich.show_exception
documentation:
Display exception properly.

Args:
    e: Exception to display

classes.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress

methods.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress.__init__
documentation:
Initialize new Progress to track endpoint runs progress.

Args:
    *args: args given to rich.progress.Progress
    **kwargs: kwargs given to rich.progress.Progress

methods.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress.__enter__
documentation:
Enter on progress context.

Returns:
    This progress

methods.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress.get_default_columns
documentation:
Override get_default_columns to fit with endpoint run progress.

Returns:
    A tuple of default ProgressColumn

methods.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress.add_run_task
documentation:
Add a new progress task to track endpoint run progress.

Args:
    run_id: A run unique id
    name: A name to display on progress bar
    short_uuid: An endpoint run uuid (compact version)
    eta_in_ms: A task estimated time of arrival, in ms
    state: Initial run state

methods.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress.update_all
documentation: Update all run tasks.

methods.name: ikclient.cli.rich.Progress.on_progress
documentation:
Endpoint run progress callback function.

Args:
    run_id: A run unique id
    name: A name to display on progress bar
    uuid: Endpoint run uuid
    state: Endpoint run state (eg: PENDING, SUCCESS, ... )
    eta: A tuple with eta lower bound / upper bound
    **_: Extra and unused parameters
Override rich progress to easily manage endpoint runs progress.

modules.name: ikclient.cli
documentation: Root cli.

functions.name: ikclient.cli.run
documentation:
Run deployment task on images.

Args:
    url: Deployment URL
    token: An Ikomia Scale API valid token
    *images: Image sources. Can be a path (Python Path or str), Results object, PIL Image or raw bytes
    task_name: A task name to run. If None use default task
    parameters: Task parameters
    output_directory: A path to save run results

Raises:
    Exception: When something wrong happen on task run

functions.name: ikclient.cli.cli
documentation:
Run deployment workflow on local images.

 
URL Deployment endpoint url
IMAGE [IMAGES...] Images to process
   # noqa: D301

Args:
    url: Deployment endpoint URL
    image: Image to process
    images: Images to process
    task_name: Task name to run
    parameter: Parameter to give to task
    output_directory: Where to save task results (None mean display them)
    token: A valid Ikomia Scale API token
    debug: True to display debug information, False otherwise

Raises:
    Exception: when something fail on deployment run

modules.name: ikclient.core.results
documentation: Endpoint call results.

classes.name: ikclient.core.results.Results

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new object that contains endpoint run results.

    inputs: raw run inputs

documentation:
Get results output length.

Returns:
    Output length

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_output_raw
documentation:
Get raw output type and data from index.

Args:
    index: output index

Returns:
    A tuple that contains type and data

Raises:
    IndexError: when index is out of outputs range

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_output_binary
documentation:
Return image output as binary.

Args:
    index: output index

Returns:
    Image as bytes

Raises:
    ValueError: when output is not an image

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_output
documentation:
Get a result formatted output.

Args:

Returns:
    Output as PIL.Image or Python data

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_outputs
documentation:
Get all results outputs.

Yields:

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.save_output
documentation:
Save output to directory / filename.

Args:

    filename: Filename to use to save output. If None, craft one from uuid and index

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.save_outputs
documentation:
Save all outputs to directory.

Args:
    directory: directory to save outputs

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_input_raw
documentation:
Get raw intput type and data from index.

Args:
    index: input index

Returns:
    A tuple that contains type and data

Raises:
    IndexError: when index is out of inputs range

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_input_binary
documentation:
Return image input as binary.

Args:
    index: input index

Returns:

Raises:

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_input
documentation:
Get a result formatted input.

Args:

Returns:

methods.name: ikclient.core.results.Results.get_inputs
documentation:
Get all results inputs.

Yields:

To easily manage endpoint call results.

modules.name: ikclient.utils.image
documentation: Transform image from / to base64.

functions.name: ikclient.utils.image.pil_image_to_b64_str
documentation:
Convert PIL.Image.Image data to base 64 string.

    image_format: set image format (compression) before converting to b64. None mean keep same format.

Returns:

Convert image file to base 64 string.

Convert bytes to base 64 string.

Args:

Returns:

documentation:
Convert b64 string of image to PIL image structure.

Args:
    b64_image: base 64 string of image to convert

Returns:
    Image as PIL.Image.Image structure

functions.name: ikclient.utils.image.b64_str_to_image_bytes
documentation:
Convert base 64 string to bytes.

Args:

Returns:

methods.name: ikclient.core.workflow.Workflow.get_task_output_types
documentation:
Return the list of outputs of the given task.

If task_name is not provided, it returns the list of the first leaf task.

Args:
    task_name (str): task name for which the output types are wanted

Returns:
    types (list of str)
This class helps to manipulate raw json workflow.

modules.name: ikclient.http.logging
documentation: Enhance httpx logging by display lot of useful informations to debug ikomia scale deployment requests / responses.

functions.name: ikclient.http.logging.get_logging_hooks
documentation:
Get httpx Client event hooks to log information about request and responses.

Args:
    logger: A logger to use to log information about requests and responses
    is_async: True if must return async hooks version

Returns:
    A dict with request and response hook, as expected by httpx.Client event_hooks

classes.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger

methods.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger.__init__
documentation:
Initialize new object with custom logger.

Args:
    logger: A custom logger to use to log messages

documentation:
Log request information.

Args:
    request: A Request to log

methods.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger.async_log_request
documentation:
Log request information, async version.

Args:
    request: A Request to log

methods.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger._log_response_meta
documentation:
Log response meta data.

Args:
    response: A Response to log meta data

methods.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger._must_log_response_content
documentation:
Introspect and log about response content and return if whole content must be logged.

Args:
    response: A response to log

Returns:
    True if whole content must be logged, False otherwise

methods.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger.log_response
documentation:
Log response information.

Args:
    response: A Response to log

methods.name: ikclient.http.logging.HTTPLogger.async_log_response
documentation:
Log response information.

Args:
    response: A Response to log
Expose sync and async method to log httpx Requests and Responses that can be used on httpx client event hooks.

modules.name: ikclient.http.auth
documentation: HTTP authentication classes.

classes.name: ikclient.http.auth.ScaleJwtAuth

methods.name: ikclient.http.auth.ScaleJwtAuth.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new deployment auth class.

Args:
    scale_url: Ikomia scale URL
    endpoint_url: deployment endpoint URL
    token: Token to authenticate
Here, don't manage an async version, as
* httpx don't support auth_flow async version (for now)
* getting a valid JWT is a prerequisite, so even in async,
need to keep this code blocking for all endpoint requests

methods.name: ikclient.http.auth.ScaleJwtAuth.jwt
documentation:
Get a valid JWT for endpoint by creating or refreshing if needed.

Args:
    force: force to get new token, even if current one is still valid

Returns:
    A valid JWT token as str

Raises:
    ValueError: when server response is invalid

methods.name: ikclient.http.auth.ScaleJwtAuth.auth_flow
documentation:
Execute the httpx authentication flow.

Args:
    request: An http request to set authorization headers

Yields:
    Authorized request

Manage JWT token directly from ikscale dedicated endpoint.

This permit to:
    * get a valid JWT from ikscale token API
    * avoid share sensible oauth client_id and client_secret

But:
    * we can't (yet) get token using oauth flow
    * we can't (yet) refresh token using oauth flow
    * we have to use token API authentication

modules.name: ikclient.http.session
documentation: Deployment endpoint session, sync and async versions.

classes.name: ikclient.http.session.PollerMixin

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.PollerMixin._get_uuid
documentation:
Get call UUID from deployment /api/run endpoint response.

Args:
    data: Endpoint response

Returns:
    Call UUID as str

Raises:
    ValueError: when can't parse response

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.PollerMixin._next_polling_strategy
documentation:
Return information about next polling strategy.

Args:
    data: Previous server response that embed (or not) polling advice
    count: Number of polling iteration

Returns:
    A tuple with time to next polling, in ms and a bool if polling will be long (True) or short (Fale)

Raises:
    ValueError: when can't parse response

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.PollerMixin._get_progress_data
documentation:
Get data to give to 'on_progress' function from polling response.

Args:
    data: Data returned by polling result query

Returns:
    Data to give to 'on_progress' function as dict

Raises:
    TypeError: when data type is not supported

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.PollerMixin._on_progress
documentation:
Log task progress, default internal function.

Args:
    run_id: A task unique id
    name: Name of running task
    uuid: Endpoint run uuid
    state: Endpoint run state (eg: PENDING, SUCCESS, ... )
    eta: A tuple with eta lower bound / upper bound
    results: Run results, if available
A mixin for deployment endpoint results poller.

classes.name: ikclient.http.session.ExtraSessionMixin

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.ExtraSessionMixin.get_unique_id
documentation:
Get a unique id to track run steps through 'on_progress' function.

Returns:
    A unique id, as str

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.ExtraSessionMixin.raise_for_status
documentation:
Check response to give high valuable exception on deployment endpoint well known errors.

Args:
    response: A response to check

Raises:
    WorkflowFailedException: when a endpoint call run failed

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.ExtraSessionMixin.async_raise_for_status
documentation:
Check response to give high valuable exception on deployment endpoint well known errors, async version.

Args:
    response: A response to check
A mixin to embed constants and functions to enhance Sessions (sync and async).

classes.name: ikclient.http.session.Session

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.Session.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new session.

Args:
    url: Deployment URL
    auth: Ikomia Scale deployment authentication object

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.Session.run_on
documentation:
Run deployment.

Args:
    context: A deployment run call context
    inputs: A list of image to run on
    on_progress: A callable to report call progress

Returns:
    Run results

Raises:
    httpx.HTTPError: when something get wrong on run call
    NoResultsException: when can't get run call results
Sync session.

classes.name: ikclient.http.session.AsyncSession

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.AsyncSession.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new async session.

Args:
    url: Deployment URL
    auth: Ikomia Scale deployment authentication object

documentation:
Set the maximum concurrent calls.

Args:
    count: max concurrent calls when using asyncio tasks

Raises:
    ValueError: when try to set a value upper than AsyncClient.concurrent_call_limit

methods.name: ikclient.http.session.AsyncSession.run_on
documentation:
Run deployment.

Args:
    context: A deployment run call context
    inputs: A list of image to run on
    on_progress: A callable to report call progress

Returns:
    Run results

Raises:
    httpx.HTTPError: when something get wrong on run call
    NoResultsException: when can't get run call results
Async session.
